source_title: 09 Shrine - Raya and the Last Dragon/11 Creating Orb Niagara FX

evidences.content: 好了，现在让我们为球体创建粒子，让它们在球体周围旋转，并向球体本身进发。 Alright, now let's create our particles for the orb and we'll have them swirling around and going in and around towards the orb itself. 所以，让我们靠近一点，我会设置一个新的相机复选标记，然后按下 ctrl 4。 So let's get in closer and I'll set a new camera check mark and hit ctrl 4. 现在我可以随时跳回到这个视图。因此，在内容浏览器中 So now I can always jump back to this view. So in the content browser, 我回到 UEVFX 101 assets 下的 orb 文件夹，让我们从选定的发射器中创建一个新系统。 I'm back under UEVFX 101 assets and under the orb folder and let's create a new system from selected emitters. 在这种情况下，我们需要的是渐进渐出的粒子流。 And in this case, we want a flow of particles that are fading in and out. 因此，我们可以选择喷泉或悬挂微粒。我选择喷泉，这样我们就能看到不同的模板。 So we could pick either a fountain or hanging particulates. I'll pick fountain just so we can see a different template. 我们将其命名为 NSOrbTrails01。 And we'll call this NSOrbTrails01. 好了，让我们抓住新的尼亚加拉系统并将其拖入场景，现在它就会到处喷洒粒子了。 All right, so let's grab that new Niagara system and drag it into our scene and now it's spraying particles everywhere. 因此，这显然不是我们想要的。 So it's obviously not exactly what we want. 因此，我们首先可以移除这里的锥形添加速度，当我们 So the first thing that we can remove here, this add velocity in cone under the particle spawn when we're 在初始化粒子属性时，我们可以将其删除，现在就只剩下重力了。至于这个 initializing our particle properties, we can delete that and now we just have gravity. And for this, 实际上，我们可能不需要重力。我把参考图片调出来，你们可以再看一遍。 we actually probably don't want gravity. I'll just pull up the reference image so you can see it again. 但我们会让这些东西在周围旋转，进进出出。 But we'll have these kind of swirling around and going in and out. 因此，在这种情况下，我们可以直接删除重力模块。对于我们的比例颜色 So in that case, we can just delete the gravity force module. For our scale color, 我们可以将其切换为进出。 we can switch this to go in and out. 因此，它从不透明性为零开始，在生命周期的中途增长到 1，然后在完成后又回到零。 So it starts at zero opacity, grows to one halfway through its life cycle and then ends back at zero once it's completed. 我们可以根据初始化的粒子设置将粒子变小。 We can make the particle smaller under our initialized particle settings. 如果我们想更改，也可以在上面设置我们的终身设置。 We have our lifetime settings up there too if we want to change that. 我们将最小值设为 1，最大值设为 2。接下来我们要做的就是改变粒子行为。 Let's set the min to one and our max to two. And the next thing we want to do is change our particle behavior. 因此，我们可以在这里选择一个点力，现在就有粒子从中心射出了。 So we can go here and we can select a point force and now we have particles shooting out from the center. 我们可以创建一个层，我们可以改变我们的 One layer that we could create, we could just change our 将生命周期设置为 0.1 至 0.5 这样的低值，然后将颜色调低很多。 lifetime settings to something really low like 0.1 to 0.5 and then change our color a lot lower. 这可能是一个很酷的图层。这些尼亚加拉系统的好处是，我们可以直接复制粘贴。 And that could be a cool layer. And the great thing about these Niagara systems is we can just copy and paste this. 因此，我将把第二个重命名为外向爆破，然后暂时把它隐藏起来。 So I'll rename this second one to outward burst and then we'll just hide that for now. 然后，我们回到主喷泉，并将其称为 And then we'll go back to our main fountain and we'll call this 漩涡，然后我们再回到原来的设置。因此，自从我们添加了点力后，就有了这些漩涡。 swirls and then we'll go back to the settings we had. So since we added that point force, we have these going out. 但如果我们反过来做一个负数、 But if we reverse this and do a negative number, 它就会开始向画面中心吸引，然后就会开始产生这种类似于弹跳漩涡的行为。 it'll start to attract towards the center of the frame and that'll start to give us this sort of like bouncy swirling behavior. 因此，我们可以将其增加到负 900 这样的数值，只是为了尝试一下。 So we could increase this to something like negative 900 just to try that out. 之后，再加入一个卷曲噪声力。现在，我们可以在这个运动的基础上产生一些湍流。 And then after this, add in a curl noise force. Now we can get some turbulence on top of this movement. 因此，一定要尝试用它来做实验。还有一个平移噪声场，听起来就像这样。 So definitely try experimenting around with this. There's also this pan noise field, which is exactly what it sounds like. 这基本上是一个恒定的速度，你可以在这个三维空间中平移噪声场。 This is basically a constant speed where you can pan the noise field through this 3D volume of space. 因此，这也是在乱流中加入一些运动的另一种方法。 So that's another way to add some movement into your turbulence. 但同时启用这两种功能后，我们就有了这种有趣的形状、这两种有趣的行为，它们都有点像...... But by enabling both, now we have this interesting shape, these two interesting behaviors that are kind of 相互交错。当我们透过相机 intersecting with each other. And when we look through our camera, 这是我们最后的检查，我们也许可以让这些粒子更亮或更大一些，这样我们就能从更远的地方看到它们了。 that's our final check and we could probably make these particles a bit brighter or bigger so that we see them from further away. 在初始化的粒子设置下，我们可以增加 Under the initialized particle settings, we could increase this 0.5。还有一点需要注意、 by 0.5. And one thing to look out for, 有时，这些尼亚加拉粒子系统会留下这些鬼影轨迹，尤其是从远处看。 sometimes these Niagara particle systems can leave these ghosting trails, especially from a distance. 因此，要在底部的控制台变量中进行调整，只需键入 r.antiAliasingMethod So to adjust this in your console variables at the bottom, just type in r.antiAliasingMethod 然后输入空格问号。如果你查看输出日志，就会发现我们使用的是时间超级分辨率。 and then type in space question mark. And then if you look in the output log, we can see that we're using temporal super resolution. 因此，如果我们将抗锯齿方法改为 2，这并不是时间超分辨率、 So if we change our anti-aliasing method to 2, which is not temporal super resolution, 这将消除轨迹后的重影，使尼亚加拉系统看起来更精确。 this will get rid of that ghosting behind trails and help your Niagara systems look more accurate. 我们只需在通过 "影片渲染队列 "进行渲染时，记住将其添加到控制台变量中即可。 We'll just have to remember to add this into our console variables when we render out through Movie Render Queue. 最后就是将其添加到我们的序列器中，并整理我们的大纲。 And then the last thing is to add it into our sequencer and organize our outliner. 因此，让我们将其添加进来，添加一个 Niagara 组件，即 Niagara 系统生命周期跟踪、 So let's add this in, add a Niagara component, a Niagara system lifecycle track, 将其拖到前面，右键单击生命周期，转到属性、年龄更新模式，并将其设置为所需年龄。 drag this to the front, right-click the lifecycle, go to properties, age update mode, and set it to desired age. 现在，它可以按照时间线持续回放，我们就准备好了。 And now it plays back consistently to a timeline and we're set. 现在，我要友情提醒你整理你的大纲器，因为它很快就会变得一团糟。正如你所看到的，很快就会乱成一团、 And now is a friendly reminder to organize your outliner because it can get messy very quickly. As you can see it very quickly, 我们的场景中就会出现大量物体。 we get a ton of objects in our scene. 因此，我要创建一个特效文件夹，然后将这两架飞机放入特效文件夹中 So I'm gonna create an effects folder and then I'll put both of these planes into that effects folder 右键单击它们。我要转到特效。 by right-clicking them. I'm going to move to effects. 然后，当我们点击这些，很容易就能将其重命名为 Orb Glow 和 Orb Sphere。 Then when we click on those, it's really easy to rename this to Orb Glow and Orb Sphere. 现在来看看我们的结果与参考图像的对比，我认为我们已经非常接近了。 And now here's a look at our result versus our reference image, and I think we're getting pretty close. 我们也许可以再增加几个粒子。 We could probably add a couple more particles. 我会去平衡这一点，但我认为这给了我们达到这一点所需的一切。 I'll go in and balance that, but I think this gives us everything that we need to get to that point. 现在就看你如何将你的项目提升到那个层次了。在尼亚加拉系统中添加用户参数 And now it's up to you to take your project to that level. And look at adding user parameters to your Niagara system 这样你就可以在场景中单独拨号了。这就是尼亚加拉的功能。 so you can dial them in individually inside of your scene. So that does it for Niagara. 我们将进行最后一课，添加更多的氛围效果，并完善我们的场景、 We're gonna do one last lesson to add in a couple more atmospheric effects and polishing our scene, 然后我们将进入最终渲染设置，以及如何将其导入 Nuke。 and then we'll get into our final render settings and how to bring it into Nuke. 我们就快成功了。此时，请确保再给项目拍一张快照、 So we're almost there. Make sure to take another snapshot of your project at this point, 这样我们就能看到这与我们的抛光程序之间的区别。 so that way we can see the difference between this and our polishing pass.
evidences.speaker: instructor
